system.description:
"Your Lifebinding Spirit is the furnace's flame incarnate."

LEVEL 3

Flameworker. Exchange knowledge of the Necrotic spell school for Fire.

Seasoned Journeyman. Whenever you Safe Rest, choose one:

  • Weaponsmith. Your weapon gains +WIL damage until your next Safe Rest.
  • Armorsmith. Your armor gains +WIL defense until your next Safe Rest.

LEVEL 7

Lightforged. Searing Light and Lifebinding Spirit healing grants WIL+STR Temp HP.

Living Ember. Crits from your Searing Light or Lifebinding Spirit also inflict Smoldering. Searing Light can be used against Smoldering targets.

LEVEL 11

Master of the Hammer. +STR to Weaponsmith and Armorsmith. Your bludgeoning attacks against Smoldering targets ignore armor.

LEVEL 15

Quench the Blaze. (Reach 6, 1/encounter) Smoldering creatures take WIL d6 fire damage (ending the condition) and are Restrained until the end of their next turn.
